# Vendor Products

## Overview
Manajemen produk dan jasa vendor.

## File Location
- `src/pages/vendor/Products.tsx` - Halaman products
- `src/components/vendor/ProductPhotoUpload.tsx` - Upload foto

## Database Tables
- `products` - Data produk
